top_comment.author: Dagon
top_comment.text:
To paraphrase an old adage:

You have a problem that is NOT "how do I collect more money from my subjects", and you've decided to use tax policy to solve it.  Now you have two problems.

summary: The main claim is: “When it comes to very powerful technologies—and obviously AI is going to be one of the most powerful ever—we need to be careful,” he says.
